title: aspidium tomentosum
intro: Aspidium tomentosum, also known as the soft shield fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Aspidium tomentosum include treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as aiding in the relief of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Aspidium tomentosum include infusions, decoctions, and teas that can be used to treat various health conditions.
